originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Optimizing P3O Advantage Computation with Cython in PufferLib
summary: Worked on porting the advantage normalization function for the P3O algorithm from NumPy to Cython to reduce overhead. Identified that the Cython-generated code was still slow due to inefficient loop constructs and lack of SIMD, and explored moving log standard deviation computation to the GPU to bypass CPU bottlenecks.
